subject: docs(backlog): clean up TODO, add deferred review items to TODO + HISTORY
body:
Removed completed items from TODO (Phase 2, Phase 4, legacy migration).
Added 3 deferred review findings as new TODO items:
- Extract shared ML worker management (~300 lines duplicated)
- Use embedding clustering in import pattern creation
- Import history view (importBatches stored but never displayed)

Updated HISTORY.md with all fixes from this session.
